content: Wilson has held previous board positions for the Marine and Coastal Committee a COAG subcommittee ; Western Australian Marine Science Institution; CRC Torres Strait; the Centre for the Application of Molecular Biology to International Agriculture and was an editorial board member for the Marine Biotechnology journal, published by Springer-Verlag
